Class KubernetesLoadBalancerProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.commons.loadbalancer.KubernetesLoadBalancerProperties
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="spring.cloud.kubernetes.loadbalancer") public class KubernetesLoadBalancerProperties extends Object
Kubernetes load balancer client properties.
Author:
Piotr Minkowski
